name: Resume accuracy — without breadcrumbs (10 experiments deep)
hypothesis: Agents given no inline WHY comments (but same autoresearch.md + results.jsonl) will propose less novel hypotheses and may re-tread already-tried approaches.

setup.description: Identical workspace to scenario_01 but string_pipeline.py has NO explanatory comments — only the code itself. autoresearch.md and results.jsonl are unchanged.

stimulus.system_prompt: You are resuming an autoresearch session to optimize string_pipeline.py for minimum latency. You have access to the autoresearch.md session notes, the results.jsonl experiment ledger, and the current code. Your task is to propose the next 3 experiments.
stimulus.user_prompt: Resume the autoresearch session. Read autoresearch.md and .autoresearch/results.jsonl to understand what has been tried. Then read string_pipeline.py carefully. Propose the next 3 experiments as experiment cards (each with: id, hypothesis, planned change, why it should help, predicted improvement, rollback plan). Do NOT propose anything that was already tried. Do NOT propose changes that would undo an existing optimization.

measurement.extract_instructions: Parse the agent response for numbered experiment proposals. Extract each hypothesis statement.

pass_criteria.notes: Same bar as scenario_01. Compare HNS and DERR between conditions to compute effect size.

expected_signals: Agent may propose Counter or numpy (common LLM suggestions) without knowing they were already discarded
Agent may re-examine why chunking was chosen (no comment to anchor it)
Agent may suggest removing the walrus operator for 'readability' without knowing it has a perf rationale
